query_normalized: predicting plant stress response from publicly available transcriptomic data biology
rationale: The paper focuses on identifying genetic loci (QTL/SNPs) and modeling yield plasticity using crop models and genome-wide association studies, rather than analyzing or predicting stress responses using transcriptomic data.
